hero.title: AI for Hairdresser
hero.description: Your virtual assistant simplifies hair care by managing bookings, recording style preferences, sending care reminders, and scheduling recurring appointments.

stats.label: Fewer missed appointments with automated reminders.
Reduced hours spent on scheduling and note-taking.
Higher client adherence with consistent style tracking and tailored care.

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Run Your Salon
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we've designed our AI Virtual Receptionist to help hairdressers and salons manage their day-to-day operations effortlessly. Whether you're running a busy salon or working independently, your AI Receptionist handles calls, bookings, and messages — ensuring your clients always receive quick, professional service while you focus on styling.

blocks.heading: Stay Focus on Clint, Not the Phone
blocks.description: Between colours, cuts, and blow-dries, it's easy to miss a call. That's where your AI Receptionist comes in. It can answer questions like 'Do you do balayage?', 'Can I book a cut and colour next week?', or 'What's the cancellation policy?' instantly. It manages bookings, reschedules, and sends reminders — keeping your day organized and your chairs full.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Booking or New Client Again
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist works around the clock, ensuring every potential client is greeted with warmth and professionalism — even after hours. It provides service information for everything from men's cuts and blow waves to hair extensions and bridal styling, and confirms bookings directly into your calendar. No more missed opportunities or unanswered calls — your business runs smoothly, 24/7.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Hairdressers Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by hairdressers and salon owners across Australia. It integrates seamlessly with your booking system, handles calls professionally, and ensures your clients receive a polished, consistent experience. Best of all, your AI Receptionist can be trained specifically to your salon's workflow — reflecting your brand's voice, services, and the level of care your clients expect. Let our AI manage your admin so you can focus on what you do best — creating great hair and happy clients.

card.heading: Simplify Client Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each appointment, you or your team can record short voice memos — automatically transcribed and summarized for easy record-keeping. You can upload client colour formulas, product preferences, and style notes securely to each profile, helping your team deliver a personalized experience every visit.
